description: Vaivora weapon effect data for Archer tree classes.

design_patterns.linear_proficiency: Buffs existing rotation without changing shape.
design_patterns.gap_filling: Adds damage sources during CD gaps or creates passive damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Air Burst
effects: Damages within Smoke Grenade by activating [Air Burst] per 1 second
Skill factor proportional to Cannon Shot
AoE Attack Ratio: 20
Struck enemy gets [Slow] for 2 seconds

level_4_effect.description: Sweeping Cannon Cooldown decreases by 20 seconds

design_analysis.reasoning: Smoke Grenade passively pulses Cannon Shot-level damage per second. Persistent AoE.

proc_mechanic.name: Armor-Piercing Shell
proc_mechanic.trigger: All Musketeer skills and normal attacks
effects: Ignores enemy's Defense by 15%
When enemy is character, ignores Defense by 20%

design_analysis.reasoning: Flat DEF penetration on all attacks. Directly amplifies effective ATK.

proc_mechanic.name: Centerfire
effects: Additionally fires 1 time to the target
Skill factor is 30% of Explosion at current level, hits: 5
Additionally casted Explosion damages only 1 target

level_4_effect.description: Artillery Call Cooldown decreases by 20 seconds

design_analysis.reasoning: Extra 5-hit follow-up on Explosion at 30% SFR.

proc_mechanic.name: Cluster Shot
effects: Fire exploding bolt to damage
Skill factor = Rapid Fire at current level, 2 consecutive hits
Cooldown: 15 seconds
Maximum targets: 30
Can be used during Kneeling Shot

level_4_effect.description: Block and Shoot Fire Speed doubles

design_analysis.reasoning: Grants entirely new AoE skill usable during Kneeling Shot. Fills gaps with a new button.

proc_mechanic.name: Beast Master
effects: Maximum HP of companion +25%
When companion becomes incapable, instantly recovers 50% HP and returns to battle (CD: 40s)

proc_mechanic.name: Double Marking
effects: Chance to fire Homing Arrow doubles

proc_mechanic.name: Hawking
effects: 5 Hawk shoots down and attacks the designated point
Attacks twice per Hawk for 5 seconds
Skill Factor 15% of current Pheasant, Maximum 10 consecutive hits
Falconer: Hawk Eye Attribute effect applied
Damage vs Beast enemy by additional Hawk +50%

design_analysis.reasoning: 5 autonomous Hawks attack for 5 seconds after Pheasant. Persistent damage.

passive_bonuses: Changes Unbending Spirit buff to max 4 stacks

proc_mechanic.name: Jusalnegi
effects: Fires 2 continuous time when casting Pyeonjeon

level_4_effect.description: White Horn Bow FD +50%, Black Horn Bow FD +50%

proc_mechanic.name: Lever Action
effects: Precision Fire Firing Speed doubles

proc_mechanic.name: Obliterate
effects: Explosive Residue left at spot, damages enemies for 10 seconds
Skill factor/s is 10% of Detonate Trap SFR
Number of Explosive Residue target: 10

design_analysis.reasoning: Persistent 10s damage zone after trap detonation.

proc_mechanic.name: Orbital Arrow
effects: Additional damage to 20 enemies by descending gigantic arrow every 1 second
Skill factor = 1 hit of Arrow Sprinkle
Duration = fired Arrow Sprinkle duration

design_analysis.reasoning: Persistent descending arrow every 1s for full Arrow Sprinkle duration.

proc_mechanic.name: Reinforced Bowstring
effects: Apply as 2 stacks when applying Bodkin Point buff
Apply as 2 stacks when applying Barbed Arrow buff

level_4_effect.description: Divine Machine Arrow FD +100%. Both charges/overheat replenished at same time.

proc_mechanic.name: Shadowless Poison
effects: Poison Rain drops around and damages enemy
Poison Rain judged as same skill as Golden Frog

design_analysis.reasoning: Golden Frog triggers passive Poison Rain AoE.

passive_bonuses: Decreases Double Take CD by 5 seconds

proc_mechanic.name: Tempest
effects: Twister created within 70 range of target
Pops non-boss monsters into air for 1 second
Skill factor = Double Take at current level
Targets: 10

design_analysis.reasoning: Appends AoE Twister to Double Take.

passive_bonuses: AoE Attack Ratio of Piercing Shot +10

proc_mechanic.name: Triple Steps Single Shot
effects: Rapid Shot damages max 10 enemies nearby target

design_analysis.reasoning: AoE expansion + CD reduction on core skills.
